description: Use when you need to control Slack from Clawdbot via the slack tool, including reacting to messages or pinning/unpinning items in Slack channels or DMs.
description_zh: 通过Clawdbot的Slack工具控制Slack时使用，支持在频道或私信中为消息添加表情反应、置顶或取消置顶内容。
name: Slack

description: CLI to manage emails via IMAP/SMTP. Use `himalaya` to list, read, write, reply, forward, search, and organize emails from the terminal. Supports multiple accounts and message composition with MML (MIME Meta Language).
description_zh: 基于IMAP/SMTP的邮件管理CLI工具。使用`himalaya`可在终端中列出、阅读、撰写、回复、转发、搜索和组织邮件，支持多账户及MML（MIME元语言）邮件撰写。
name: Himalaya

description: Gmail API integration with managed OAuth. Read, send, and manage emails, threads, labels, and drafts. Use this skill when users want to interact with Gmail. For other third party apps, use the api-gateway skill (https://clawhub.ai/byungkyu/api-gateway).
description_zh: Gmail API集成（托管OAuth），支持邮件、会话、标签及草稿的读取、发送与管理。用户需与Gmail交互时使用本技能。其他第三方应用请使用api-gateway技能(https://clawhub.ai/byungkyu/api-gateway)。
name: Gmail

description: Read and send email via IMAP/SMTP. Check for new/unread messages, fetch content, search mailboxes, mark as read/unread, and send emails with attachments. Sup...
description_zh: 通过IMAP/SMTP收发邮件，支持检查新邮件、获取内容、搜索邮箱、标记已读/未读及发送附件。
name: imap-smtp-email

description: Use when you need to control Discord from Clawdbot via the discord tool: send messages, react, post or upload stickers, upload emojis, run polls, manage threads/pins/search, fetch permissions or member/role/channel info, or handle moderation actions in Discord DMs or channels.
description_zh: 通过 Clawdbot 的 discord 工具控制 Discord，支持发送消息、添加反应、上传贴纸/表情、发起投票、管理话题/置顶/搜索、查询权限及成员/角色/频道信息，以及在私信或频道中执行管理操作。
name: Discord

description: Microsoft Outlook API integration with managed OAuth. Read, send, and manage emails, folders, calendar events, and contacts via Microsoft Graph. Use this skill when users want to interact with Outlook. For other third party apps, use the api-gateway skill (https://clawhub.ai/byungkyu/api-gateway).
description_zh: Microsoft Outlook API集成，支持托管OAuth。通过Microsoft Graph管理邮件、文件夹、日历和联系人。适用于Outlook交互场景，其他第三方应用请使用api-gateway技能。
name: Outlook

description: WhatsApp Business API integration with managed OAuth. Send messages, manage templates, and handle conversations. Use this skill when users want to interact with WhatsApp Business. For other third party apps, use the api-gateway skill (https://clawhub.ai/byungkyu/api-gateway).
description_zh: WhatsApp Business API集成（托管OAuth），支持发送消息、管理模板及对话处理。适用于WhatsApp Business交互场景，其他第三方应用请使用api-gateway技能(https://clawhub.ai/byungkyu/api-gateway)。
name: WhatsApp Business

description: Interact with Twitter/X — read tweets, search, post, like, retweet, and manage your timeline.
description_zh: 与 Twitter/X 互动，可阅读、搜索、发布、点赞、转发推文及管理时间线。
name: x-twitter

description: Google Meet API integration with managed OAuth. Create meeting spaces, list conference records, and manage meeting participants. Use this skill when users want to interact with Google Meet. For other third party apps, use the api-gateway skill (https://clawhub.ai/byungkyu/api-gateway).
description_zh: Google Meet API集成（托管OAuth），支持创建会议空间、查看记录及管理参会者。用于Google Meet交互场景，其他第三方应用请使用api-gateway技能（https://clawhub.ai/byungkyu/api-gateway）。
name: Google Meet

description: Interact with Moltbook social network for AI agents. Post, reply, browse, and analyze engagement. Use when the user wants to engage with Moltbook, check their feed, reply to posts, or track their activity on the agent social network.
description_zh: 与Moltbook AI代理社交网络交互，支持发帖、回复、浏览及互动分析。适用于参与社区、查看动态、回复帖子或追踪活动。
name: moltbook-interact

description: Mailchimp Marketing API integration with managed OAuth. Access audiences, campaigns, templates, automations, reports, and manage subscribers. Use this skill when users want to manage email marketing, subscriber lists, or automate email campaigns. For other third party apps, use the api-gateway skill (https://clawhub.ai/byungkyu/api-gateway).
description_zh: 集成 Mailchimp Marketing API（托管 OAuth），可管理受众、活动、模板、自动化、报告及订阅者。适用于邮件营销、订阅者列表和自动化邮件场景。其他第三方应用请使用 api-gateway 技能 (https://clawhub.ai/byungkyu/api-gateway)。
name: Mailchimp

description:
Zoho Mail API integration with managed OAuth. Send, receive, and manage emails, folders, and labels.
Use this skill when users want to send emails, read messages, manage folders, or work with email labels in Zoho Mail.
For other third party apps, use the api-gateway skill (https://clawhub.ai/byungkyu/api-gateway).
Requires network access and valid Maton API key.
description_zh: Zoho Mail API集成（托管OAuth），支持邮件收发及文件夹、标签管理。适用于邮件发送、读取、文件夹管理等操作。其他第三方应用请使用api-gateway技能。需网络访问及有效Maton API密钥。
name: Zoho Mail

description: Browse and search Reddit in read-only mode using public JSON endpoints. Use when the user asks to browse subreddits, search for posts by topic, inspect comment threads, or build a shortlist of links to review and reply to manually.
description_zh: 使用公共JSON端点只读浏览Reddit，适用于浏览子版块、按主题搜索帖子、查看评论串或生成待手动回复的链接列表。
name: Reddit (read only - no auth)

description: iMessage/SMS CLI for listing chats, history, watch, and sending.
description_zh: iMessage/SMS命令行工具，支持列出会话、查看历史、实时监控和发送消息。
name: Imsg

description: Browse, search, post, and moderate Reddit. Read-only works without auth; posting/moderation requires OAuth setup.
description_zh: 浏览、搜索、发布和管理 Reddit。只读功能无需认证；发布和管理需配置 OAuth。
name: Reddit

description:
飞书消息发送与文档创建工作流。
触发场景：查找群成员、查找群ID、发送消息失败需要重新尝试。
适用于：发送飞书消息。
description_zh:
飞书消息发送与文档创建工作流。
触发场景：查找群成员、查找群ID、发送消息失败需要重新尝试。
适用于：发送飞书消息。
name: Feishu Messaging

description: Manage MyFeed things and groups via the MyFeed REST API.
description_zh: 通过 MyFeed REST API 管理事物和群组。
name: My Life Feed

description: Connect a Feishu (Lark) bot to Clawdbot via WebSocket long-connection. No public server, domain, or ngrok required. Use when setting up Feishu/Lark as a messaging channel, troubleshooting the Feishu bridge, or managing the bridge service (start/stop/logs). Covers bot creation on Feishu Open Platform, credential setup, bridge startup, macOS launchd auto-restart, and group chat behavior tuning.
description_zh: 通过 WebSocket 长连接将飞书（Lark）机器人接入 Clawdbot，无需公网服务器、域名或 ngrok。适用于将飞书配置为消息渠道、排查桥接故障或管理服务（启停/日志）。涵盖飞书开放平台机器人创建、凭证配置、桥接启动、macOS launchd 自动重启及群聊行为调优。
name: Feishu Bridge

description: Send short status descriptions in chat for long-running tasks. Use when you need to provide periodic updates during multi-step operations, confirm task completion, or notify of failures. Includes automated periodic monitoring that sends updates every 5 seconds, status message templates, and a helper function for consistent status reporting.
description_zh: 为长时任务在聊天中发送简短状态更新。适用于多步骤操作中的定期进度通知、完成确认或失败告警。包含5秒自动监控、状态模板及统一报告函数。
name: Task Status

description:
📄 Feishu Doc Manager | 飞书文档管理器

Seamlessly publish Markdown content to Feishu Docs with automatic formatting.
Solves key pain points: Markdown table conversion, permission management, batch writing.

将 Markdown 内容无缝发布到飞书文档，自动渲染格式。
解决核心痛点：Markdown 表格转换、权限管理、批量写入。
description_zh:
📄 Feishu Doc Manager | 飞书文档管理器

Seamlessly publish Markdown content to Feishu Docs with automatic formatting.
Solves key pain points: Markdown table conversion, permission management, batch writing.

将 Markdown 内容无缝发布到飞书文档，自动渲染格式。
解决核心痛点：Markdown 表格转换、权限管理、批量写入。
name: 📄 Feishu Doc Manager | 飞书文档管理器

description: postiz
description_zh: postiz
name: postiz

description: Read, search, and manage Outlook emails and calendar via Microsoft Graph API. Use when the user asks about emails, inbox, Outlook, Microsoft mail, calendar events, or scheduling.
description_zh: 通过 Microsoft Graph API 读取、搜索和管理 Outlook 邮件与日历。当用户询问邮件、收件箱、Outlook、微软邮箱、日历事件或日程安排时使用。
name: Outlook

description:
Kit (formerly ConvertKit) API integration with managed OAuth. Manage email subscribers, forms, tags, sequences, broadcasts, and custom fields.
Use this skill when users want to manage their email marketing lists, create or update subscribers, manage tags, or work with email sequences and broadcasts.
For other third party apps, use the api-gateway skill (https://clawhub.ai/byungkyu/api-gateway).
description_zh: Kit（原ConvertKit）API集成，支持托管OAuth。管理邮件订阅者、表单、标签、序列、广播和自定义字段。适用于邮件营销列表管理、订阅者维护、标签及邮件序列/广播操作。其他第三方应用请使用api-gateway技能。
name: Kit

description: Telegram Bot API integration with managed authentication. Send messages, manage chats, handle updates, and interact with users through your Telegram bot. Use this skill when users want to send messages, create polls, manage bot commands, or interact with Telegram chats. For other third party apps, use the api-gateway skill (https://clawhub.ai/byungkyu/api-gateway).
description_zh: Telegram Bot API 集成，支持托管认证。可发送消息、管理聊天、处理更新并与用户互动。适用于消息发送、投票创建、命令管理或聊天交互等场景。其他第三方应用请使用 api-gateway 技能（https://clawhub.ai/byungkyu/api-gateway）。
name: Telegram Bot
